arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Bournemouth: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man Utd host Bournemouth in the Premier League on Sunday, Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Paul Pogba has 'several options' as Ruben Amorim gets first signing
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim will be keen to strengthen a number of areas in January, with left-back an area he will look to target after injuries to Tyrell Malacia and Luke Shaw this season

arts.ttl: Why isn't Man Utd vs Bournemouth on TV? How to watch Premier League match
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s confidence-filled Manchester United side host high-flying Bournemouth on Sunday, but UK-based fans will be unable to tune in live for the Premier League clash

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford's 'three reasons' for Man Utd exit bombshell - 'Hasn't dealt with it'
arts.sum: Premier League-winner Lee Sharpe has offered his two cents on Marcus Rashford's likely exit from Manchester United after the England forward has come under huge pressure at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man Utd injuries: Every player missing for Bournemouth clash

arts.ttl: 'He has had good performances': Iraola on Philip Billing's impact from the bench
arts.sum: Philip Billing has had to wait for his chance to make an impact on the Cherries season so far.

arts.ttl: Adele and Man Utd - Southgate's Desert Island Discs
arts.sum: Former England manager Gareth Southgate explains why he chose Adele's Someone Like You as one of his tracks on the latest episode of Desert Island Discs.

arts.ttl: Barcelona reject offer to sign Manchester United star in January
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick is not interested in a January transfer move for Manchester United star Alejandro Garnacho. La Blaugrana could bolster their first team squad in the mid-season market but Flick will have a limited budget to work with. arts.ttl: Harry Maguire 'offered Man United escape route' by Italian giants as Serie A reunion mooted
arts.sum: Serie A title chasers Napoli reportedly eye a free transfer for Manchester United's Harry Maguire, who is free to talk to foreign clubs in January.

arts.ttl: Fresh blow for Marcus Rashford as Love Island star Grace Jackson 'dumps him after realising the Man United forward wasn't serious about their relationship'
arts.sum: Man United forward Marcus Rashford has reportedly been dumped by former Love Island contestant Grace Jackson, with the star claimed to have 'not been serious about the relationship'.
